title: ZenithHUD
description: ⚡ ZenithHUD - The Ultimate Custom F3 Screen
body:
# ⚡ ZenithHUD - The Ultimate Custom F3 Screen

# [Instagram ](https://www.instagram.com/shubham_._._96?igsh=M3djNndqczI5ejhi)

**ZenithHUD** 

> **replaces Minecraft's boring vanilla F3 debug screen with a stunning, animated, and fully customizable HUD that provides all the information you need in a beautiful package.**




```
- These Is Not Fully Working F3!
- The Compass Degress Are Not Correct !
- Fps Is Downgrade Due To Animations!
- In Feature The Realeasing Of Version Will Getting Fixing The Bugs!
```


🎨 **Beautiful Design**
- **Sleek Panel Design** - Warm amber/orange theme with gradients
- **Smooth Animations** - Panels slide in from edges
- **Fade Effects** - Elegant fade transitions
- **Color-Coded Values** - Visual indicators for light levels, FPS, and ping
- **Progress Bars** - Visual representation of FPS and light levels

📸 **Screenshots**

![F3 Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9508ed1d823e335fac97bc4fc108ce64cbeef051.png)

![Position](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5647eba32503ad4e11a0f1644bbccd6cd979b79c.png)![WORLD INFO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b2bbaed22a0701af5a2d6d1937cf3925f3b016.png)![Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/801106a42e25eac5c81403b31b6e71235e8f7e2f.png)![Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/058a174d6e8fe33c55829b6a2449506038c9b838.png)!

🔧 **Installation**

1. Install **Fabric Loader** (0.15.0+)
2. Download **Fabric API** for your Minecraft version
3. Download ZenithHUD and place it in your `mods` folder
4. Launch Minecraft and press F3 to see the magic!

## 📦 **Included Modules**

| Module | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **CoordinateModule** | XYZ position, chunk data, facing direction |
| **WorldInfoModule** | Biome name, block light, sky light, day counter |
| **PerformanceModule** | FPS, ping, memory usage, Java version |
| **CompassModule** | Animated compass with cardinal directions |

### 🔜 **Coming Soon**

- [ ] Configurable panel positions
- [ ] Customizable colors
- [ ] Toggle individual modules
- [ ] More information panels


**ZenithHUD** - Because your F3 screen deserves to look good too! ✨
